notes: All 15 responses are near-duplicates that share the same three identifier-correctness failures flagged as hard discriminators: createAujourd'hui (apostrophe added), validatePlaylistKeys (trailing underscore dropped), aujourd'hui.json (apostrophe added). They also uniformly misplace the 500 into Combiner.push instead of as the rateLimitedForEach 3rd argument. 13 of 15 leave the rateLimitedForEach( paren unclosed (broken JS); only t0.4|rep2 and t0.7|rep0 balance with )); and score a point higher. The image is itself truncated at Cache.compressTracks(tracks); so the closing braces every response adds are a (minor, reasonable) hallucination not present in the source. No invented functions or fabricated strings beyond those braces; Combiner.push and the escaped La playlist d'aujourd'hui string are correctly preserved across all responses.
